splits.title: LESSON IV. Home Economics. Fourth Week in May. THE LATTER-DAY SAINT HOME. THE HOME BUDGET.
splits.start_boundary: LESSON IV. Home Economics. Fourth Week in May.
splits.end_boundary: Farmers' wives can use money equivalents in their estimates.

files.notes: This file contains a single complete home economics lesson on budgeting, not multiple merged lessons. It includes the lesson content, questions, and suggested tables for home budget planning.
